summary: 15 film announcements, 13 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: The Grinch 2
film.announcement: Jim Carrey is eyeing a reteam with Ron Howard on a sequel to 'How the Grinch Stole Christmas' at Universal.

film.title: Palm Grove
film.talent: Kate Hudson, Ana de Armas; Director Kornél Mundruczó; Writer James Morosini
film.announcement: Kate Hudson and Ana de Armas to star in erotic thriller 'Palm Grove' from director Kornél Mundruczó.

film.title: Little Santa
film.announcement: Apple Original Films is making an animated adaptation of the children's book 'Little Santa' with director Peter Baynton and Bret McKenzie writing songs.

film.title: My What If Year
film.announcement: America Ferrera is developing a feature adaptation of Alisha Fernandez Miranda's memoir 'My What If Year' at Warner Bros. with Heidi Schreck scripting.

film.title: Secret Daniels Event Pic
film.announcement: Charles Melton joins Matt Damon in a secret project from the Daniels at Universal.

film.title: Ages of the Moon
film.talent: Steve Buscemi, Aidan Quinn; Director Oren Moverman; Writer Sam Shepard
film.announcement: Steve Buscemi wraps filming on 'Ages of the Moon,' a Sam Shepard adaptation directed by Oren Moverman, with Liam Neeson joining the project.

film.title: The Tourist Curse
film.talent: Sydney Agudong, Henry Ian Cusick, Mahina Napoleon, Tori Anderson
film.announcement: 'Lilo & Stitch' star Sydney Agudong is cast in Hawaii-set comedy 'The Tourist Curse' with Henry Ian Cusick, Mahina Napoleon, and Tori Anderson.

film.title: Lady
film.announcement: Satirical comedy 'Lady' starring Sian Clifford scores a U.S. distribution deal.

film.title: Hello & Paris
film.announcement: Kate Hudson-Javier Bardem rom-com 'Hello & Paris' adds six cast members at Amazon MGM.

film.title: Two Prosecutors
film.announcement: 'Two Prosecutors' is set for release on Criterion Channel in the U.S.

film.title: Wicker
film.announcement: Sundance breakout 'Wicker' gets an October release date from Black Bear.

film.title: I Am AI
film.announcement: Hugo Award finalist 'I Am AI' novelette has been optioned for a feature film adaptation.

film.title: Supergirl
film.announcement: Craig Gillespie is making 'Supergirl' with a visual style inspired by 'Mad Max.'

film.title: Survivor
film.announcement: An animated 'Survivor' movie is in the works at Paramount, as confirmed by host Jeff Probst.

tv.title: Fallout
tv.talent: Manny Jacinto, Emily Mortimer, Thomasin McKenzie
tv.announcement: Manny Jacinto, Emily Mortimer, and Thomasin McKenzie join Season 3 of Amazon series 'Fallout.'

tv.title: Wonder Presents: The Stand-Ups
tv.announcement: Wonder Project gets into stand-up with a six-special series 'Wonder Presents: The Stand-Ups.'

tv.title: 13 Going On 30
tv.announcement: Adeline Rudolph joins Netflix's '13 Going On 30' reboot.

tv.title: The God of the Woods
tv.announcement: Tracy Letts and Lola Kirke join the cast of Netflix's 'The God of the Woods,' among 14 other new cast members.

tv.title: The Traitors: New Blood
tv.announcement: 'The Traitors: New Blood' sets a September premiere date on NBC for the civilian series.

tv.title: Simon Says
tv.announcement: 'Simon Says' competition series is coming to Netflix.

tv.title: Warrior Cats
tv.announcement: Disney picks up an animated adaptation of the global phenomenon 'Warrior Cats.'

tv.title: Pass Tha' Mic
tv.announcement: Jo Koy to host comedy showcase series 'Pass Tha' Mic' presented by Martin Lawrence.

tv.title: The Naturalist
tv.announcement: 'The Naturalist' series adaptation is in the works at ABC from 'CSI' alums.

tv.title: Moriarty Rising: A Sherlock Holmes Tale
tv.announcement: Alessio Liguori to direct 'Moriarty Rising: A Sherlock Holmes Tale.'

tv.title: Quinta Brunson Overall Deal
tv.announcement: Quinta Brunson exits Warner Bros. TV and signs a new overall deal with Disney's 20th Television.

tv.title: Proximity Media TV Overall Deal
tv.announcement: Ryan Coogler's Proximity Media strikes a TV overall deal with Netflix after exiting Disney pact.

tv.title: Matthew McConaughey and Woody Harrelson Apple TV Comedy
tv.announcement: Matthew McConaughey and Woody Harrelson reunite in an Apple TV comedy.
